name: Library Overdue Reminder
subject: Library Book Overdue: {{ doc.book }}
message:
Dear {{ frappe.db.get_value('Library Member', doc.member, 'member_name') }},

This is a reminder that the book {{ doc.book }} issued to you on {{ doc.issue_date }} was due on {{ doc.due_date }}.

Please return it at the earliest. An overdue fine is accruing at the configured per-day rate from Library Settings.

Regards,
Library Team
